name: ExtensionRequestOrchestration_Action_Participant_TypeCanonical
title: R5: Who or what can participate (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `RequestOrchestration.action.participant.typeCanonical` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`RequestOrchestration.action.participant.typeCanonical` 0..1 `canonical(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/CapabilityStatement)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `RequestOrchestration.action.participant.typeCanonical` 0..1 `canonical(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/CapabilityStatement)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `RequestOrchestration.action.participant.typeCanonical` has a context of RequestGroup.action.participant based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `RequestGroup`.
Element `RequestOrchestration.action.participant.typeCanonical` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
